name: Tianfeng Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianfeng Securities Co., Ltd. operates as a securities company. The company offers brokerage business, such as securities trading, diversified financial wealth management products, and professional capital intermediary; and a package of services for professional investors and high net worth clients, such as private equity funds and trusts, including fast trading systems, investment research services, performance evaluation and risk management, financing solutions, and promotion of quality asset projects. It also provides investment banking services, such as equity, debt financing, and mergers and acquisitions, as well as IPO and refinancing services; and engages in bond underwriting, asset securitization, asset management, private fund, and futures businesses. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Wuhan, China.
